title: Dybowskia seretii
intro: Dybowskia seretii is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Dybowskia seretii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Dybowskia seretii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used to make a topical cream or ointment to treat skin conditions.
taxonomy: Dybowskia seretii is a species of flowering plant in the family Actinidiaceae. It is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree, native to tropical Africa.
